steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content:
The blank follows a long noun clause ('That the repeated thermonuclear... eight years') and needs to agree in number with this singular subject.

The phrase after the blank introduces a reason for the phenomenon.

The first side is a noun clause as subject ("That the... years").

The second side is a verb + prepositional phrase ("[blank] to the white dwarf's...").

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content:
The subject ('That the repeated thermonuclear outbursts...') is singular, requiring a singular verb.

Choice A ('is due') correctly matches this in number and form.

The other choices either lack a verb (B) or use non-finite forms (C, D) that violate the need for a main clause verb.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
